name: Audio System

criteriaResults.evidence: AudioManager global exists, init() method exists and creates a Web Audio API AudioContext. Verified AudioManager.ctx instanceof AudioContext returns true after init().

Grep for .mp3/.wav/.ogg/.aac found zero results in source code (only contract/proposal files reference these extensions as exclusions). All 19 play* methods use OscillatorNode, GainNode, and BiquadFilterNode for synthesis.

masterVolume is a number (default 0.7), muted is a boolean (default false). Both are settable via Object.defineProperty interceptors at audio.js:1209-1231 that clamp masterVolume to [0,1] and call _updateMasterGain() on change.
playJump() exists at audio.js:100. Creates square wave oscillator sweeping 300Hz->600Hz with sine harmonic. Executes without error.

playLand() at line 133 (sine 120Hz->50Hz with noise burst), playWallSlide() at line 155 (sawtooth 80Hz with bandpass filter), playAttack() at line 182 (sawtooth 800Hz->200Hz with highpass filter + noise). All execute without error.

playHurt() at line 212 (square 500Hz->150Hz with dissonant sawtooth), playDeath() at line 245 (5-note descending cascade with low rumble). Distinct sound profiles confirmed in source. Both execute without error.

player.js diff confirms AudioManager.playJump() is called at 4 locations: idle->jump (line 277), walk->jump (line 339), fall->landed->buffered jump (line 405), wallSlide->wall jump (line 471). Verified in source code integration.
Monkey-patched AudioManager.playHurt and called Player.hurt() — confirmed called=true. player.js:877 calls AudioManager.playHurt() inside the hurt() method before checking death.
playEnemyHit() at audio.js:285 (triangle 350Hz->200Hz + noise), playEnemyDefeat() at audio.js:307 (sine ascending pop with square overtone). Both execute without error.

playBossEntrance() at line 346, playBossHit() at line 386, playBossDefeat() at line 426, playBossPhaseTransition() at line 465. All four use distinct synthesis: entrance=sawtooth drone, hit=sawtooth+rumble, defeat=ascending cascade+chord, phase=rising sawtooth+dissonant warning. All execute without error.

playCoinCollect() at line 510 (sine 880/1100Hz bling), playHealthPickup() at line 544 (ascending arpeggio), playExtraLife() at line 566 (5-note fanfare), playMenuSelect() at line 601 (short sine tick), playMenuConfirm() at line 619 (two-note chime). All 5 execute without error.
playStageClear() at line 651 (7-note ascending victory jingle), playGameOver() at line 683 (4-note descending sad melody with minor drone). Both execute without error.

Monkey-patched AudioManager.playCoinCollect, loaded stage 1-1 with coins, positioned player on coin, called Collectibles.update() — confirmed called=true. collectibles.js:106 calls AudioManager.playCoinCollect() on coin collection.

Simulated title screen menu navigation: ArrowDown triggered AudioManager.playMenuSelect (selectCalled=true), Enter triggered AudioManager.playMenuConfirm (confirmCalled=true). Verified in menu.js diff: 8 locations call playMenuSelect, 7 locations call playMenuConfirm. worldmap.js also calls both on navigation.
startAmbient(worldId) at audio.js:729, stopAmbient() at line 758. Both methods exist and execute without error. startAmbient('forest') creates wind drone + LFO + periodic bird chirps.

Tested all 4 worlds: forest (wind+chirps), desert (hot wind+sand whispers), tundra (howling wind+ice shimmers), volcano (deep rumble+lava crackles). Each has unique oscillator params, filter settings, and periodic effects. All return true (no errors).

Monkey-patched startAmbient, called GameState.setupStage() with currentStageId='1-1' — lastAmbient was set to a truthy value. states.js:126-132 maps stage world index to theme names ['forest','desert','tundra','volcano','volcano'] and calls AudioManager.startAmbient(worldTheme).
startBossMusic() at audio.js:1038, stopBossMusic() at line 1048. Both execute without error. startBossMusic creates an 8-beat procedural percussion loop with kick, hi-hat, and snare.

updateBossMusic(healthRatio) at audio.js:1066. At healthRatio 1.0: _bossTempo=200ms. At healthRatio 0.2: _bossTempo=120ms. Confirmed tempoAtLow < tempoAtFull (faster at low health). Formula: newTempo = 100 + healthRatio * 100.

Monkey-patched startBossMusic, loaded stage 1-3, called Enemies.spawnBoss() — musicStarted=true. enemies.js diff shows AudioManager.playBossEntrance() + AudioManager.startBossMusic() in _spawnBoss(), and AudioManager.stopBossMusic() in _onBossDefeated().

Pause menu _pauseOptions[1] is 'Volume: XX%'. Simulated selecting volume option (index 1) and pressing ArrowLeft — masterVolume decreased from 0.7 to 0.6. menu.js:549-556 handles left/right on volume option with 0.1 step.
Pause menu _pauseOptions[2] is 'Mute: ON/OFF'. Simulated selecting mute option (index 2) and pressing Enter — AudioManager.muted toggled to true. Label updates dynamically via menu.js:524.
index.html line 57: <script src='src/audio.js'></script> loaded before states.js (line 59) and game.js (line 60). AudioManager is accessible as a global on page load.

Game.init() at game.js:18 calls AudioManager.init(). After page load, AudioManager.ctx exists (not null), ctxState is 'suspended' (expected due to autoplay policy). Click/keydown event listeners resume the context (audio.js:44-50).

19 distinct play* methods found: playJump, playLand, playWallSlide, playAttack, playHurt, playDeath, playEnemyHit, playEnemyDefeat, playBossEntrance, playBossHit, playBossDefeat, playBossPhaseTransition, playCoinCollect, playHealthPickup, playExtraLife, playMenuSelect, playMenuConfirm, playStageClear, playGameOver. Each uses distinct frequencies, waveforms, and envelopes.

With running AudioContext: muted=true -> gain.value=0, muted=false -> gain.value=0.7 (restored). Verified via resumed AudioContext test. Implementation uses setValueAtTime on master GainNode via _updateMasterGain(). Playing sounds while muted produces no error. Property interceptors (Object.defineProperty) ensure _updateMasterGain is called on every muted/masterVolume change.
All 12 stages (1-1 through 4-3) load correctly. Each stage has width > 0 and valid tile data. Verified via Level.loadStage() + Enemies.init() for all 12 stage IDs.
Citadel stage 5-1 loads with width >= 200 and bossData !== null. The Architect boss data is present. VICTORY state exists and is reachable via GameState.VICTORY.

Player movement, combat, and state machine function correctly. Pause menu includes Resume, Volume, Mute: OFF, Restart Stage, Return to World Map, Quit to Title — all original options preserved plus new audio controls added.
Zero JavaScript errors captured on page load and during module initialization. pageerror listener captured no unhandled errors. All script tags resolve correctly.

regressionResults.details: Full regression suite of 59 tests across sprints 1-9 passed. Verified: basic engine (canvas, physics, input, camera), game states (8 states), world map with 13 stages, save system, enemies/bosses, HUD, all stage content, Citadel/Architect boss, and cross-sprint integration.

holistic.designQualityNotes: Audio system follows the design spec's dark theme and game-first philosophy. Volume/mute controls are canvas-drawn menu items matching the existing Warm Slate/Muted Gold/Soft Cream palette. Pause panel sizing adjusted correctly (panelW=280, panelY=155) to accommodate 6 options. Menu selection triangle and text styling consistent with design-spec.md component patterns.
holistic.codeQualityNotes: Excellent code organization: 1232 lines in audio.js, well-structured with clear sections (init, player sounds, enemy sounds, boss sounds, UI sounds, ambient, boss music, helpers). Property interceptors via Object.defineProperty for masterVolume/muted are elegant. Consistent guard clauses (if !this.ctx) prevent errors. No global namespace pollution beyond AudioManager.
holistic.originalityNotes: Strong variety across 19 distinct synthesized sounds. Each uses unique combinations of waveforms, frequency sweeps, filter types, and envelopes. World-specific ambient systems (forest chirps, desert whispers, tundra ice shimmers, volcano crackles) add genuine atmosphere. Procedural boss percussion with dynamic tempo based on health ratio is creative.
holistic.completenessNotes: All 30 contract criteria met. 19 sound effects (4 more than the 15 minimum). Full integration across player, enemies, bosses, collectibles, menus, world map, and state transitions. Volume/mute controls in pause menu. Ambient audio for all 4 worlds. Boss music with health-based tempo. AudioContext autoplay policy handled correctly.
holistic.uxPolishNotes: Audio integration is comprehensive and non-intrusive. Sounds are appropriately short and varied. Master volume defaults to 0.7 (not full blast). Muting is easily accessible in pause menu. Ambient audio starts/stops at appropriate state transitions. No audio leaks between states. Wall slide sound uses periodic triggering (every 8 frames) to avoid spam.
holistic.primaryScoreFormula: Average of designQuality(8) + codeQuality(9) + originality(7) + completeness(9) + uxPolish(7) = 40/5 = 8.0

notes: All 30 sprint criteria PASS. No blocking failures.
All 59 regression tests from sprints 1-9 PASS. No regressions detected.

C-26 (mute behavior) initially appeared to fail in Playwright due to AudioContext being in 'suspended' state (browser autoplay policy). Confirmed working correctly with a running AudioContext — gain goes to 0 on mute, restores to masterVolume on unmute.
The audio.js module is 1232 lines with 19 synthesized sound effects, 4 world-specific ambient systems, and a procedural boss percussion system. Zero external audio file dependencies.
Design quality score of 8 reflects proper integration with the existing dark theme UI — pause menu expanded with Volume and Mute options using the same canvas-drawn component patterns.
